subject: New option to configure multicloud in SO
commit_message:
New option to configure multicloud in SO

From dublin release, it is now possible to configure
multicloud in SO setting ORCHESTRATOR to multicloud
in cloud_sites table.
My proposal is to describe this new configuration option
and to explain the possible restrictions of both options

Review: typos and use msb https url

Issue-ID: DOC-577
Signed-off-by: Hardy Thierry <Thierry.Hardy@orange.com>
Change-Id: Idb05bc4fa95519cb06af06c4c070d6d48de3f1fa
